provider: City University of Hong Kong Undergraduate Catalogue 2026/27

supplements.evidenceNote: The official CityU undergraduate catalogue identifies Catalogue Term Semester A 2026/27 and publishes the 121-credit BSc Chemistry structure, coded common requirements, non-GREAT and GREAT core requirements, the Major elective pool and Comprehensive Chemistry, Cosmetic Chemistry, Forensic Chemistry and GREAT Stream constraints. The admissions page independently confirms Academic Year of Entry 2026/2027 and Admission Code 1202 (JS1202). This supplement assigns the published common and elective pools to the applicable Streams; it does not treat every listed option as required. The catalogue wording 'Majors without Stream' conflicts with its simultaneous publication of three non-GREAT Streams, so the nested Stream constraints require manual review and are not presented as an automatic graduation decision. CHEM3042 officially carries 1-4 variable credits and is stored with credits 0 so it does not enter known-credit totals. Except for three Comprehensive Stream options explicitly marked Year 4, the official catalogue does not publish a complete recommended Year/Semester plan, so no study year or term is inferred from course levels or offered semesters.
